  "findings": [
    "Incorrect manifold valve operating sequence: equalizing valve operated before high-pressure block valve was isolated/opened correctly, risking transmitter damage or process bypass."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately",
    "Close all manifold valves to return to a safe, known state",
    "Re-verify the correct 3/5-valve manifold operating sequence using the manufacturer's procedure before proceeding"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a 3-valve or 5-valve manifold out of sequence can cause severe damage to the differential pressure transmitter's sensor capsule due to one-sided overpressure, or cause unintended process fluid bypass. The technician must stop and follow the exact manufacturer sequence.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer standard operating procedures for 3-valve/5-valve manifolds",
    "ISA Instrument Technician Training Guidelines"
  ]
}
